---
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false
source("setup.R")
```

::: {.callout-note title="Helpful Tips"}
You can hover your mouse above "About Me" column entries to read the full text associated with the profile. The formatting of this table is a work in progress.
:::

```{r, echo=FALSE}
stupiddftable <- stupiddf3 %>%
  select(-...1)
#change n/a to "no response" in character columns, not numeric
stupiddftable$MembershipType[is.na(stupiddftable$MembershipType)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$MaritalStatus[is.na(stupiddftable$MaritalStatus)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$WantChildren[is.na(stupiddftable$WantChildren)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$HaveChildren[is.na(stupiddftable$HaveChildren)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$City[is.na(stupiddftable$City)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$`State/Region`[is.na(stupiddftable$`State/Region`)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Country[is.na(stupiddftable$Country)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Country[is.na(stupiddftable$Country)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$AstrologicalSign[is.na(stupiddftable$AstrologicalSign)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Zipcode[is.na(stupiddftable$Zipcode)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$AboutMe[is.na(stupiddftable$AboutMe)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$EducationLevel[is.na(stupiddftable$EducationLevel)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Income[is.na(stupiddftable$Income)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$TestedIQ[is.na(stupiddftable$TestedIQ)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$MyersBriggs[is.na(stupiddftable$MyersBriggs)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$LookingFor[is.na(stupiddftable$LookingFor)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$PoliticalOrientaion[is.na(stupiddftable$PoliticalOrientaion)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Diet[is.na(stupiddftable$Diet)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Ancestry[is.na(stupiddftable$Ancestry)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Race[is.na(stupiddftable$Race)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$HumanPhenotypes[is.na(stupiddftable$HumanPhenotypes)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$BodyType[is.na(stupiddftable$BodyType)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Hair[is.na(stupiddftable$Hair)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Height[is.na(stupiddftable$Height)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$EyeColor[is.na(stupiddftable$EyeColor)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$BestFeatures[is.na(stupiddftable$BestFeatures)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Tattoos[is.na(stupiddftable$Tattoos)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$BloodType[is.na(stupiddftable$BloodType)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Language[is.na(stupiddftable$Language)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Interests[is.na(stupiddftable$Interests)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$StanceOnVaccination[is.na(stupiddftable$StanceOnVaccination)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Polygyny[is.na(stupiddftable$Polygyny)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Piercings[is.na(stupiddftable$Piercings)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$LookingForInPerson[is.na(stupiddftable$LookingForInPerson)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Smoking[is.na(stupiddftable$Smoking)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$GeographicFlexibility[is.na(stupiddftable$GeographicFlexibility)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$FavoriteVacationSpot[is.na(stupiddftable$FavoriteVacationSpot)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$IdealFirstDate[is.na(stupiddftable$IdealFirstDate)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$HumanDesignType[is.na(stupiddftable$HumanDesignType)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$PassionateAbout[is.na(stupiddftable$PassionateAbout)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Spirituality[is.na(stupiddftable$Spirituality)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Mindset[is.na(stupiddftable$Mindset)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Pets[is.na(stupiddftable$Pets)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Accomodation[is.na(stupiddftable$Accomodation)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Weight[is.na(stupiddftable$Weight)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$ChildrenLivesWith[is.na(stupiddftable$ChildrenLivesWith)] <- "-"
stupiddftable$Virginity[is.na(stupiddftable$Virginity)] <- "-"
```

```{r}
truncate_with_tooltip <- function(x, n = 40) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  short <- ifelse(nchar(x) > n, paste0(substr(x, 1, n), "..."), x)
  paste0("<span title='", x, "'>", short, "</span>")
}

stupiddftable2 <- stupiddftable %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(2, 16), truncate_with_tooltip)
  )

datatable(
  stupiddftable2,
  escape = FALSE,
  filter = "top",
  options = list(pageLength = 20)
)
```
